people often come here for the views
i want to see winter too

where i live it doesnt snow, but in the south it does
this is a very turistic city, where people go if they want snow
at least u guys have these
if its too much then no
i dont think i like it that way, but i never tried
the simplest one u can do is
put some sugar on sticky rice and eat it
u can get some nuts for toppings
I have eaten something like this
is it made out of peanuts and some other things?
so it is a bit sticky tho
it's more like candy than crackers
we have crackers one but i forgot the name
we also have something similar to empanadas
cuz the shape is kinda like a pillow
we also have not fried version too
what do tou fill them with?

usually like
- mushrooms (wood ear mushrooms to be exact) 
- minced meat (usually pork, can go without meats for vegans)
- veggies (carrots, bean sprouts,...)
- quail eggs or other things based on personal reference (optional)
still the same principal but different filling
so i love empanadas is no question
cuz they are similar, maybe different filling but doesnt make big diff
we have our own pancakes that can substitute pizzas
i think you are eating bad pizzas

eeerrr...
we have like Pizza Company, Domino Pizza,...
some expensive ones like 4P's (im not that rich)
ok look, our country hasnt been invaded by the italians ok?
its has to be made in a family restaurant by some old italian dude
that's how we got bánh mì
i think i still have an image
we have a lot of italians things here bc of the inmigration
nope i lied, i lost the bánh mì pic
ye it is the fried cake i showed u
the next one is a sweet one
it has like a sweet mung bean paste inside with sugar coated crust
usually our sweet has a lot of coconut and mung bean

idk u can find that here
but u can do your own
get the recipe and do it
the flour outside is the same tbh
and to be more vietnamese style, u have to dip it in fish sauce
<@523084324724146193>  btw with the italian talk you made me remember we have our own slang here, in argentina, called lunfardo

I don't want to badmouth CZN. Especially since a lot of my friend is enjoying it... But I needed a place to vent lmao. 

Bcs holy shit that game is so uninspiring. Like sure it has really good production value but dude... Elemental weakness and break system? Really?

And their so called darkest dungeon inspired mental breakdown system literally does jackshit. Nothing!

And oh don't get me started on character design. So clean and pristine. And fucking boring.

I don't want to hate it but it is giving me a lot of reason to.
If this is not allowed, please tell me. I'll delete it.
I don't think ranting is prohibited
Having negative opinions about something is okay
And tbf, you can always try complaining to customer service
Who knows? Maybe the E7 team changed and finally listens to their fanbase
Thank you. Ive had it for a good bit. It felt good typing it out.
And yeah, maybe I'll try it. I don't think they will listen but oh well. Might as well try it.
